things.name: Rijeka Carnival
things.description: One of Europe's largest carnivals with the famous Masked Ball and International Carnival Parade

things.name: Trsat Castle
things.description: Ancient hilltop fortress with panoramic views over the Kvarner Gulf and Rjecina canyon

things.name: Governor's Palace
things.description: Hungarian Secessionist palace housing the Maritime and History Museum of Croatian Littoral

things.name: Korzo Promenade
things.description: Elegant pedestrian main street with 19th-century architecture and cafe culture

things.name: Cathedral of St Vitus
things.description: Baroque rotunda cathedral housing a miraculous 13th-century crucifix

things.name: City Tower & Roman Arch
things.description: Baroque clocktower and adjacent Roman triumphal arch - the old city entrance

things.name: Astronomical Clock
things.description: 19th-century clock tower on the Korzo marking the Austrian Empire time standard

things.name: Opatija Riviera
things.description: Elegant Habsburg-era resort just 15km away with grand villas and a coastal path

things.name: Pece ine Beach
things.description: City beach neighbourhood with a pleasant promenade and sea swimming

things.name: Krk Island Bridge
things.description: Croatia's largest island connected by the world's longest concrete arch bridge
